title: Martiusia physalodes
taxonomy: Martiusia physalodes is classified in the family Gesneriaceae. This classification places it within the order Lamiales, which includes a wide variety of flowering plants. The family Gesneriaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. The order Lamiales is further divided into several subgroups, including the Acanthaceae and the Lamiaceae. The specific classification of Martiusia physalodes provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
